content.text: Bump the CI workflow to the newer setup-action versions and node runtime.

content.content:
name: ci

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: 18
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm test
      - run: npm run build

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: .github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ jobs:
@@     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v3
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: 18
+          node-version: 20
-      - run: npm ci
+      - run: npm ci --no-audit
-      - run: npm test
+      - run: npm run test:ci
-      - run: npm run build
+      - run: npm run build:prod
*** End Patch

content.content:
Successfully applied patch to the following files:
.github/workflows/ci.yml
